title: This Theory Explains the Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: David Reich presents a theory explaining patterns in Neanderthal DNA found in modern human genomes. The discussion explores how ancient DNA analysis has revealed genetic mysteries about human-Neanderthal interactions and inheritance.
